method_summary: A training-free framework that repurposes pretrained image editing models for zero-shot referring image segmentation by leveraging early semantic grounding in intermediate representations, decomposing localization into attention-based spatial priors and feature-based semantic discrimination.
key_innovation: Discovering that strong foreground-background separability emerges in the internal representations of image editing models at the earliest denoising timestep, before any visible image transformation occurs.
title: Early Semantic Grounding in Image Editing Models for Zero-Shot Referring Image Segmentation
